name: Curse of the Scarab
tagline: Gray Merchant burst drain off black devotion
idea: The deck floods the board with zombies through tribal synergy, token generation, and reanimation, then exploits zombie count for passive drain, card advantage, and lethal combat.

briefKills.line: Gray Merchant of Asphodel ETB (devotion 6–10; recur via Reanimate / Necromancy / Scarab activated) → each opponent loses your black devotion on ETB; recurs for repeat bursts
Warren Soultrader + Gravecrawler + Plague Belcher (Rule 0) → sac/recast Gravecrawler loop → each cycle drains 1; up to 39 at 40 life

openings: Weakest axis — Kill reliability (4/5): the judges' soft spot.
Decap never-closes in 1% of goldfish games — a grind risk.
Tables (all three) never-close 9% of the time.

clock.src: lab cos_clock_lab @8k · Diregraf no-self-token fix 2026-06-29 (~1pp; med T8/T11 holds)
clock.caption: Decap (one opponent) lands around T8; the full table around T11.

gamePlan: The deck floods the board with zombies through tribal synergy, token generation, and reanimation, then exploits zombie count for passive drain, card advantage, and lethal combat. Every zombie entering the battlefield simultaneously grows the army (Diregraf Colossus, Necroduality), replaces itself on death (Wilhelt, the Rotcleaver), triggers card draw (Kindred Discovery, Undead Augur), and increases the upkeep drain from The Scarab God.
winLine: Gray Merchant burst drain off black devotion

finishers.name: Gray Merchant Burst Drain
finishers.note: Gray Merchant of Asphodel drains each opponent for your black devotion on ETB.

finishers.name: Lord-Pumped Zombie Combat + Cyclonic Rift
finishers.note: With two lords in play, 2/2 zombie tokens are 4/4s.

finishers.name: Aristocrats Drain
finishers.note: Plague Belcher drains **each opponent** for 1 life per zombie death — 3 across the table per death in a 4-player pod.

finishers.name: Mass Reanimation into Burst Drain
finishers.note: Buried Alive or Entomb stocks the graveyard with high-impact zombies (Grave Titan, Gray Merchant, Rot Hulk).

finishers.name: Rooftop Storm Explosion
finishers.note: Rooftop Storm makes all zombie spells cost {0}.

finishers.name: Warren Soultrader Loop
finishers.note: Warren Soultrader + Gravecrawler + Plague Belcher is a three-card mana-neutral loop.

rulings.name: Scarab God's activated ability EXILES the targeted creature card
rulings.note: (the original is gone) and the token is always a 4/4 black Zombie keeping all the original's abilities.

rulings.name: Its death trigger returns it to your HAND, not the command zone
rulings.note: no commander tax accumulates. Only exile permanently answers it.

rulings.name: The upkeep counts zombies at resolution
rulings.note: instant-speed zombie creation in response raises the drain.

rulings.name: Plague Belcher ETB puts two −1/−1 counters on a creature you control
rulings.note: never a 1-toughness zombie (it dies); use a token, Carrion Feeder, or a Mikaeus undying creature.

rulings.name: Crowded Crypt / Wilhelt decayed tokens
rulings.note: self-sac at end of combat when they attack, but still count for an upkeep drain and trigger death payoffs first.

rulings.name: Mikaeus gives undying to every non-Human zombie
rulings.note: board wipes cost opponents two wipes to clear.

rulings.name: Warren Soultrader + Gravecrawler + Plague Belcher
rulings.note: is a Rule 0 combo loop (1 drain per cycle, self-limited by your life). Flag to the pod.

1 The Scarab God

mull.strategy: Looking for: lands + an early 1-drop zombie or rock + a path to Scarab God by T5, with a payoff or token generator behind it. A reactive pile (counterspells + removal) on good lands is still a toss — the keep needs a zombie, a token generator, or a drain payoff to give the engine a body to work with. On 2-land hands, only a genuine rock bridges to Scarab God on time (Bone Miser does not count as mana).

killTree.title: Curse of the Scarab — The Scarab God
killTree.root:
The Scarab God resolved (~T5)
flood the board with Zombies (tribal + tokens + reanimation)
Zombie count drives drain, draw & combat
killTree.stall:
grow the Zombie count + draw (Kindred Discovery); the upkeep drain is passive
inevitability — board wipes feed the yard for Living Death, so don't fear them
killTree.caption: parallel vectors — they stack, not rank

background.kill: each opponent loses X = Zombies you control, every upkeep (no mana/attack)

lines.need:
Gray Merchant of Asphodel ETB
(devotion 6–10; recur via Reanimate / Necromancy / Scarab activated)
lines.kill: each opponent loses your black devotion on ETB; recurs for repeat bursts
sac/recast Gravecrawler loop → each cycle drains 1; up to 39 at 40 life
empty a Zombie hand for free → 12+ Zombies → 12+ Scarab drain next upkeep

lines.need:
lord-pumped Zombies (Death Baron / Warchief / Mikaeus)
+ Cyclonic Rift (overload) clears blockers (fallback)
lines.kill: focus-fire one opponent with a 4/4+ wide board
